BAGR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: ADFL: 1, IL2VL: 1

URXL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: ADFL: 3, IL2VL: 2, ADFR: 1, IL2L: 1
Conns out: IL2L: 2, AQR: 1, CEPVL: 1, DVA: 1

URXR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: ADFR: 2, IL2R: 2, IL2VR: 2, DVA: 1
Conns out: IL2R: 6, AQR: 1, IL1R: 1
